channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Lincoln Returns Home After Proving Out 'Game Changing' Connectivity
item.description: The USS Abraham Lincoln has returned to its homeport in San Diego, marking the end of a multi-month tour at sea that included an unusually long stint without a port call. The ship's high-speed internet connectivity was a major accomplishment during this deployment, with the crew able to transmit and receive volumes of data previously unthinkable on an underway ship.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Future of Social Media in 2025: Trends, Risks, and Opportunities
item.description: As 2024 rolls into 2025, social media is on the cusp of significant changes. TikTok may shut down in the US, X (formerly Twitter) continues to deviate from mainstream norms, and Bluesky shines bright. Explore the trends, risks, and opportunities shaping the online landscape in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
